scope.method: Each verdict was decided from the exact target input and target output against fixture groundTruth. The existing advisory was not read until after this proposal was materialized.
scope.outcomeMeaning: pass means the received input and produced output are sufficient for another coding Agent to continue correctly; fail means a material omission, contradiction, unsupported claim, or wrong next action makes continuation unreliable.

factVerdicts.note: 目标输出直接保留了该 Ground truth 事实的核心语义：Peak memory must remain below 100 MiB.
目标输出直接保留了该 Ground truth 事实的核心语义：Preserve source event order.
输出保留了流式、顺序与内存目标，但没有说明 slow-consumer backpressure 已挂起这一当前阻塞状态。
输出保留了首次读取不得预索引的结论，却遗漏 SQLite 预导入及首事件等待 48 秒的失败证据。

输出保留了顺序、42 MiB 与 malformed-line recovery，但遗漏吞吐已通过和 slow-consumer backpressure 挂起。
